event_description: User sends a message (plain text or slash command) in the AI chat interface.
User invokes a built-in or installed slash command (e.g. /综合投研报告, /技术面分析).
User opens the detail panel for a specific stock by clicking a link in chat or the surge list.
User opens the detail panel for a sector/board by clicking a board link in chat.
User adds a stock to their favorites list from the stock detail panel.
User removes a stock from their favorites list.
User clicks the AI diagnosis button to request a comprehensive stock report from the detail panel.
User clicks on a stock from the abnormal movement (个股异动) list to view its details.
User creates a new chat conversation from the sidebar.
User deletes a chat conversation from the sidebar.
User saves their settings including AI provider, trading style, and risk preferences.
User installs a plugin or skill from the in-app store (应用商店).
User uninstalls a plugin or skill from the in-app store.
User manually triggers a market data synchronization from the settings panel.
